steps.title: Identify the pattern of constraints
steps.content: The passage stacks multiple obstacles—consumer expectations, congestion, and even innovations like drones face complications (lack of landing sites). “Consequently” signals what logically follows from these persistent, layered constraints.

steps.title: Determine the logical consequence
steps.content: Given that obstacles persist even when solutions are attempted, the logical conclusion is that overcoming them is unlikely in the near term. A directly states this. B reverses the direction, C recommends investment strategy not discussed, and D overstates drones' short-term promise when the passage shows they're currently constrained. That matches choice A — A is correct.
